calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER
Off Calendar Sep-22-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name, Gender and Issuance of a New Birth Certificate.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner John Thomas Badger was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Jenna Raquel Hilton-Thomas.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Gender from Male to Female, and issuance of a New Birth Certificate.

Decree Changing Name and Gender was submitted to and signed by the Court.
